meaning: An office model where employees choose a workspace that suits the nature of the task they are performing at any given time.
definition: An office model where employees choose a workspace that suits the nature of the task they are performing at any given time.
example: Under activity-based working, staff use quiet booths for deep focus and open tables for collaborative discussions.
exampleHindi: गतिविधि-आधारित कामकाज के तहत, कर्मचारी गहन फोकस के लिए शांत बूथों और सहयोगात्मक चर्चाओं के लिए खुली मेजों का उपयोग करते हैं।

meaning: A project management approach based on iterative progress and flexibility
definition: Relating to or denoting a method of project management, used especially for software development, that is characterized by the division of tasks into short phases of work and frequent reassessment and adaptation of plans.
example: The development team follows an agile methodology with two-week sprints.
exampleHindi: विकास टीम दो सप्ताह की स्प्रिंट के साथ एक चुस्त कार्यप्रणाली का पालन करती है।

meaning: Ensuring that goals, strategies, resources, and people are working coherently toward a common objective.
definition: A position of agreement or alliance.
example: Strategic alignment across departments prevented duplication of effort and accelerated delivery.
exampleHindi: विभागों के बीच रणनीतिक संरेखण ने प्रयासों के दोहराव को रोका और त्वरित वितरण किया।

meaning: A designated day when all or most employees are required to be in the office for collaboration and team meetings.
definition: A scheduled day when remote employees are required to work in the office.
example: Wednesday is the anchor day at their company, when the entire department gathers for planning sessions.
exampleHindi: बुधवार उनकी कंपनी का मुख्य दिन है, जब पूरा विभाग नियोजन सत्र के लिए इकट्ठा होता है।

meaning: Movement effects applied to text or objects within a presentation slide
definition: Movement effects applied to text or objects within a presentation slide
example: Each bullet point appeared with a fade animation.
exampleHindi: प्रत्येक बुलेट बिंदु एक फीके एनिमेशन के साथ दिखाई दिया।

meaning: Techniques used to involve and interest the audience during a presentation
definition: Techniques used to involve and interest the audience during a presentation
example: Quizzes and polls improve audience engagement during webinars.
exampleHindi: क्विज़ और पोल वेबिनार के दौरान दर्शकों की सहभागिता में सुधार करते हैं।

meaning: A wireless technology for short-range connections between devices, like phones and headphones.
definition: A wireless technology for short-range connections between devices, like phones and headphones.
example: He connected his phone to the car speaker via Bluetooth.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने अपने फोन को ब्लूटूथ के जरिए कार के स्पीकर से कनेक्ट किया।

meaning: A short piece of information highlighted with a dot or symbol in a list

meaning: खरीदना
definition: To get something by paying money.

meaning: To record or save digital data, screens, or user input in real-time (strong alternative to 'grab screen' or 'take photo of screen').

meaning: A plastic card (credit or debit card) used to make payments.

Not open for business or not allowing entrance.

meaning: A person who shares the role of presenting alongside the main presenter

meaning: एक परिभाषित क्षमता या लाभ जो किसी उद्यम को उसके प्रतिस्पर्धियों से अलग करता है।

meaning: बनाएँ
To trim or cut off the outer edges of a digital image to improve framing or reduce size (strong alternative to 'cut image edges' or 'trim borders').

meaning: The graphical representation of information and data

meaning: विशिष्ट गतिविधियों को अंजाम देने के लिए किसी अन्य व्यक्ति को किसी अधिकार का कार्यभार सौंपना।

meaning: दर्ज करें
लिफाफा
A work environment that ensures fair treatment, resources, and opportunities for all employees regardless of where or how they work.
definition: A work environment that ensures fair treatment, resources, and opportunities for all employees regardless of where or how they work.
example: Creating an equitable workplace means ensuring remote employees are not disadvantaged compared to office-based peers.

meaning: An action performed by a software program to retrieve data from a remote server or database (strong alternative to 'go get data' or 'grab data').

meaning: A work arrangement that allows employees to choose their own start and end times within agreed limits.
definition: A work arrangement that allows employees to choose their own start and end times within agreed limits.
example: Flex scheduling enabled parents to manage school drop-offs without missing any work commitments.

meaning: A printed or digital document distributed to audience members during a presentation

example: We can host our marketing graphics on a content delivery network for faster load times.

meaning: An office practice where desks are not assigned to specific individuals and are used on a first-come, first-served basis.

meaning: A question used to ask about the price or cost of something.
definition: A question used to ask about the price or cost of something.

meaning: A flexible work model that combines both in-office and remote work, allowing employees to split their time between locations.

meaning: An organisational policy that officially supports and structures a combination of in-office and remote work.

example: Their hybrid-first policy allows each team to choose how many days they work onsite.

meaning: The creation of products, services, and workplaces that accommodate the needs and abilities of the widest possible range of people.

example: Inclusive design in office layouts ensures that employees with disabilities can work comfortably in any environment.

meaning: A visual representation of information or data using graphics

meaning: The most important point or lesson from a presentation or discussion

meaning: The tendency for managers to favour employees who are physically present in the office over those who work remotely.
definition: The tendency of managers to favor employees who are physically present in the office.
example: To prevent proximity bias, the company ensured remote workers were equally considered for promotions.

definition: A work arrangement that provides clear boundaries and expectations while still offering employees significant autonomy over their schedules.
example: Structured flexibility allows employees to choose their hours while committing to team availability windows.
exampleHindi: संरचित लचीलापन कर्मचारियों को टीम उपलब्धता विंडो के लिए प्रतिबद्ध रहते हुए अपने घंटे चुनने की अनुमति देता है।

meaning: पर्यवेक्षण करें
Short for synchronize, to keep data consistent across different folders, drives, or apps (strong alternative to 'make match' or 'keep same').
definition: A brief meeting or conversation to align team members on status or decisions
example: Make sure you sync your local drafts to the cloud server before shutting down.
exampleHindi: सुनिश्चित करें कि बंद करने से पहले आप अपने स्थानीय ड्राफ्ट को क्लाउड सर्वर से सिंक कर लें।

meaning: A meeting or discussion that takes place in real time, requiring all participants to be available simultaneously.
definition: A meeting or discussion that takes place in real time, requiring all participants to be available simultaneously.
example: The team holds a synchronous meeting every Monday morning to align on the week's priorities.
exampleHindi: टीम सप्ताह की प्राथमिकताओं पर तालमेल बिठाने के लिए प्रत्येक सोमवार सुबह एक समकालिक बैठक आयोजित करती है।

meaning: To attach a keyword or metadata label to a digital piece of content, file, or photo to make it easily searchable (strong alternative to 'put a label on' or 'mark file keyword').
definition: To identify someone in a post or photo, creating a link to their profile.
example: Be sure to tag each blog post with relevant topics like SEO and marketing.
exampleHindi: प्रत्येक ब्लॉग पोस्ट को SEO और मार्केटिंग जैसे प्रासंगिक विषयों के साथ टैग करना सुनिश्चित करें।

meaning: Key ideas or facts a speaker wishes to convey during a presentation
definition: Key ideas or facts a speaker wishes to convey during a presentation
example: He prepared talking points to stay on track during the interview.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने साक्षात्कार के दौरान ट्रैक पर बने रहने के लिए बातचीत के बिंदु तैयार किए।

meaning: A point of contact or interaction between team members or with a client
definition: A point of contact or interaction, especially between a business and its customers or consumers.
example: Regular touchpoints help maintain strong client relationships.
exampleHindi: नियमित संपर्क बिंदु मजबूत ग्राहक संबंध बनाए रखने में मदद करते हैं।

meaning: To monitor and record user actions, visits, or metrics on a website or app for analysis (strong alternative to 'watch what they do' or 'follow online actions').
definition: To monitor and record user actions, visits, or metrics on a website or app for analysis (strong alternative to 'watch what they do' or 'follow online actions').
example: We use cookies to track user engagement and analyze website traffic.
exampleHindi: हम उपयोगकर्ता सहभागिता को ट्रैक करने और वेबसाइट ट्रैफ़िक का विश्लेषण करने के लिए कुकीज़ का उपयोग करते हैं।

meaning: वह दर जिस पर कर्मचारी किसी कार्यबल को छोड़ देते हैं और उन्हें प्रतिस्थापित कर दिया जाता है।
definition: The rate at which employees leave a workforce and are replaced.

meaning: प्रकार
To transfer data or files from a local computer or device to a remote server or website (strong alternative to 'send file to site' or 'put file on portal').
definition: à¤…à¤ªà¤²à¥‹à¤¡ à¤•à¤°à¤¨à¤¾
example: You can upload your profile picture through the settings page.
exampleHindi: आप सेटिंग पेज के माध्यम से अपना प्रोफ़ाइल चित्र अपलोड कर सकते हैं।

meaning: A clear, inspiring picture of a desired future state that guides long-term planning and decision-making.
definition: à¤¦à¥‚à¤°à¤¦à¥ƒà¤·à¥à¤Ÿà¤¿ (à¤µà¤¿à¤œà¤¼à¤¨)
example: The founder's bold vision for carbon-neutral logistics attracted investors who shared her ambition.
exampleHindi: कार्बन-न्यूट्रल लॉजिस्टिक्स के लिए संस्थापक की साहसिक दृष्टि ने उन निवेशकों को आकर्षित किया जिन्होंने उनकी महत्वाकांक्षा को साझा किया।

meaning: A wireless technology that allows devices to connect to the internet without cables.
definition: A wireless technology that allows devices to connect to the internet without cables.
example: The hotel provided free Wi-Fi in all rooms.
exampleHindi: होटल ने सभी कमरों में मुफ्त वाई-फाई प्रदान की।

meaning: Connected using a physical cable rather than wirelessly.
definition: Connected using a physical cable rather than wirelessly.
example: A wired connection is usually faster and more reliable than Wi-Fi.
exampleHindi: वायर्ड कनेक्शन आमतौर पर वाई-फाई की तुलना में तेज़ और अधिक विश्वसनीय होता है।

meaning: Transmitting data without physical cables, using radio waves or infrared signals.
definition: Transmitting data without physical cables, using radio waves or infrared signals.
example: He connected his wireless headphones to the laptop via Bluetooth.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने अपने वायरलेस हेडफोन को ब्लूटूथ के जरिए लैपटॉप से ​​कनेक्ट किया।

meaning: A holistic approach to balancing professional and personal responsibilities, blending them fluidly rather than keeping them separate.
definition: A holistic approach to balancing professional and personal responsibilities, blending them fluidly rather than keeping them separate.
example: Hybrid work has shifted the conversation from work-life balance to work-life integration.
exampleHindi: हाइब्रिड कार्य ने बातचीत को कार्य-जीवन संतुलन से कार्य-जीवन एकीकरण की ओर स्थानांतरित कर दिया है।
